info.title: wunderbon API
info.description:
Welcome to our living wunderbon API documentation. Here you will find almost everything you need to connect to our platform. Start using the real smart receipts® with our value added service platform. With our API we provide you with easy access to the state of the art encrypted and blockchain based service network. Rethink your POS with wunderbon.

Dig into our website to discover more thrilling information on how the blockchain technology, crypto tokens and NFTs can help you solving your daily challenge providing secure and GDPR compliant digital solutions to your customers. More thrilling information: wunderbon.app/b2b

get.description:
Returns a `Favorite` entity by its id.
The favorite contains information about the type of the entity (e.g. "Receipt") and a link to the entity (id).

delete.description:
Deletes an `Favorite` entity.
Removes the favorite and returns status. This endpoint returns a status 202 (Accepted) due to a possible delay in final deletion.

get.description:
Returns a collection of `Favorite` entities.
The collection contains single favorites entities.

parameters.description: Limit elements to return in a single request
parameters.name: limit

post.description:
Creates a `Favorite` entity.
Stores information about a favorite with type and link to entity.

get.description:
Returns an `Identifier` entity by its id.
The identifiers value is returned as hashed representation of its origin value.

parameters.description: Limit elements to return in a single request
parameters.name: limit

post.description:
Creates an `Identifier` entity
The entity is bound to the users account and can be used to identify the user for receipt transmission. The value MUST always
be hashed as described in our hashing documentation.

get.description: Returns a `Location` entity by its id.

parameters.description: Limit elements to return in a single request
parameters.name: limit

post.description:
Creates and returns an Id / Authentication `Token` entity by "clientId" and "clientSecret".
The created token can be used for accessing the wunderbon API.

Creates and returns a transmission `Token` entity by "network" and "token" (@see WAN).
The returned `Token` can be used for transmitting receipts to the wunderbon user owning the cryptogram.

Creates and returns a `WAN` cryptogram entity.
The returned `WAN` is displayed as QR code within the wunderbon App and used by the merchant to receive a transmission token.

Returns an identifier token calculated by input.

The returned identifier token is tied to the active environment (e.g. Mainnet, Testnet).

get.description: Returns a `Transaction` entity by its id.

RequestNetworkCreate.description:
RequestNetworkCreate

Model for attributes part of the request

- All Properties defined here are valid (no additional properties allowed)
- Properties initialized with value are defaults
- Optional properties are marked with a question mark "?"

name.description: Network name like PAN or My-Wonderful-Loyalty

logo.description: URL to a logo of the network

RequestNetworkUpdate.description:
RequestNetworkUpdate

Model for attributes part of the request

logo.description: URL to a logo of the network

GenericProduct.description: A generic product representation within the wunderbon domain.

EANProduct.description: An EAN product representation within the wunderbon domain.

supplier.description: Supplier or manufacturer of the product.

Quantifier.description: Quantifier of this cart item (e.g. 1 pcs. or 200 g).

quantity.description: Amount of this item in cart.

unit.description: Unit of the quantifier (e.g. kg, g, mm, m, pieces, ...).

Amount.description: Price EXCLUDING tax (e.g. VAT = Value Added Tax or others).

Tax.description: Taxes applied on this item (e.g. VAT = Value Added Tax or others).

symbol.description: A symbol as abbreviation in overview.

CartItem.description: A cart item representation within the wunderbon domain.

data.description: A generic or EAN/GTIN data based product for display.

product.description: Product node either a real EAN/GTIN product or alternatively a generic one.

groupPosition.description: Position of this item within its group.

position.description: Position of this item in cart.

TaxOverview.description: A tax overview representation within the wunderbon domain.

symbol.description: The symbol as index for the overview line (e.g. "A" or "1").

PrivateName.description: A schema for private persons name representation within the wunderbon domain.

Cashier.description: Information about the cashier at the POS.

CashPayment.description: A cash payment representation within the wunderbon domain.

description.description: A description of the payment. Can be used for example for persisting a voucher code.

TerminalWunderbon.description: A wunderbon terminal response representation within the wunderbon domain.

title.description: The title of the sales slip.

TerminalBuffered.description: A buffered terminal response representation within the wunderbon domain.

buffer.description: A collection of buffered strings for display.

TruncatedNumber.description: The PAN of the card used for transaction (https://de.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO/IEC_7810#Track_#_2).

asterisks.description: The symbol used as asterisk for truncation.

TerminalStructured.description: A structured terminal response representation within the wunderbon domain.

title.description: The title of the sales slip.

CashlessPayment.description: A cashless payment representation within the wunderbon domain.

description.description: A description of the payment. Can be used for example for persisting a voucher code.

type.description: The cashless payment type. Aligned to w3 (@see https://www.w3.org/TR/payment-method-id/#registry).

LoyaltyBuffered.description: A buffered loyalty representation within the wunderbon domain.

buffer.description: A collection of lines for display.

LoyaltyStructured.description: A structured loyalty representation within the wunderbon domain.

name.description: The name of the loyalty program (e.g. PAYBACK or DeutschlandCard).
The name of the currency (e.g. PAYBACK Punkte).

is.description: The balance after the current transaction.

was.description: The balance before the current transaction.

balance.description: The current balance before and after current transaction.

TSE.description: The TSE tax information (required by german law).

timezone.description: The timezone of start and stop.

serialNumber.description: The serial number or unique identifier of the POS.

algorithm.description: The algorithm used for calculating the signature.

RequestReceiptCreate.description:
RequestReceiptCreate

Model for attributes part of the request

- All Properties defined here are valid (no additional properties allowed)
- Properties initialized with value are defaults
- Optional properties are marked with a question mark "?"

taxes.description: Taxes overview of items in cart.

cartEncrypted.description: Used for cart data when end-to-end encryption is active

publicKeyId.description:
Id of the child public key of users master public key
Required at users client to decrypt by correct child private key

hash.description: Hash of the receipt as Keccak 384 Bit

predecessor.description:
Predecessor of the receipt.
Used if a receipt was exchanged (consists of 2 steps: 1. revoke / 2. issue)

encrypted.description: Whether the receipt is encrypted or not

RequestReceiptUpdate

description.description: Description or comment regarding the rating
